titleZh: 新《公司法》下公司监督机制的选择
titleEn: Choosing a Corporate Supervision Mechanism Under the New Company Law
abstractZh: 分析监事会、审计委员会及其他监督安排在新《公司法》下的制度选择空间，强调监督路径、信息获取和责任分配。
abstractEn: Compares the available supervision models under the revised Company Law, focusing on supervisory organs, audit committees, information access, and allocation of oversight duties.
